name: KEGG REST API
description: The KEGG REST API provides programmatic access to KEGG databases covering biological pathways, metabolic networks, molecular interactions, drug targets, disease associations, chemical compounds, genomic sequences, and functional orthologs across thousands of organisms. Seven core operations are exposed: info, list, find, get, conv, link, and ddi.

potentialAction.name: INFO — Get database release information
potentialAction.description: Display release information and statistics for a KEGG database.

potentialAction.name: LIST — List entry identifiers
potentialAction.description: Obtain a list of entry identifiers and associated names for a KEGG database.

potentialAction.name: FIND — Search entries by keyword
potentialAction.description: Search entries in a KEGG database by keyword or molecular property.

potentialAction.name: GET — Retrieve database entries
potentialAction.description: Retrieve specific KEGG database entries in flat-file, sequence, image, KGML, or JSON format.

potentialAction.name: CONV — Convert identifiers
potentialAction.description: Convert identifiers between KEGG and external databases such as NCBI, UniProt, PubChem, and ChEBI.

potentialAction.name: LINK — Find cross-references
potentialAction.description: Find related entries between KEGG databases using cross-references.

potentialAction.name: DDI — Drug-drug interactions
potentialAction.description: Find adverse drug-drug interactions for drug entries.
